channel.title: Research Radar — Daily Briefing
channel.description: Daily ~6-minute audio briefing of the autonomy-systems research radar. Generated automatically; voice is OpenAI TTS.
channel.itunes:author: Prof. Liangkai Liu
channel.itunes:summary: Daily ~6-minute audio briefing of the autonomy-systems research radar.

item.title: Research Radar — Wed May 13: Focus on AI Platforms and Multimodal Datasets Dominates Today
item.description: Today's research highlights a strong emphasis on AI platforms and multimodal datasets, particularly for STEM reasoning and robotics applications. The Open-MM-RL dataset exemplifies the trend towards integrating visual information in AI models.
